S 4 5 ( 3 ) , T & 3 2 2 &, 2CQ9 Explsnatory Memorandum (14) G.?Tl.-ai.f?. 874(51),3'&39f@T,2009 MINISTRY O F PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSlONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATlON New Delhi, the 12th October, 2010 G.S.R. 832(E).-In exercise ofthe powers conferred by sub-section (1) read with clause (e) of sub-section (2) of Section 35 and Section 36A ofthe AdministmtiveTribunals Act, 1985 (13 of 1985), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Central Administrative Tribunals (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chairmen and Members) Rules. 1985, namely :- The Central Government has decided to ~ - a n tage related additional quantum of pension to the Chairman, Vice-Chairmen and Members ofthe Central Administrative Tribunal.who were appointed before the 19th February, 2007 for the service rendered by then1 in the Central Administrative Tribunal and accordingly, the Central Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowance and Conditions of Serviee of Chairman, Vice-Chairmen and Members) Rules, 1985 are being amended with retrospective effecr. 2. It iscertified that no Chairman. Vice-Chairman and Member ofthe Central Administrative Tribunal is likely to be affected adversely by the proposed amendment being given retrospective effect. Foot Note :-The Principal Rules were published vide notificationNo. G.S.R. 644(E), dated the 10th August, 1985 and subsequently amended vide notification Nos. :- 1. ( I ) These rules may be called the Central (1) G.S.R 583(E), datedthe 18th June. 1987 Administrative Tr~bunal(Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chairmen and (2) G.S R. 9(E), dated the 6th Januar). 1988 Members) Amendment Rules, 2010. (3) G.S.R. 79(E), dated the 4th February, 1988 (2) These rules shall be applicable to thechairman, Vicechairmen and Members ofthe Central Administrative Tribunal appointed before the 19th February, 2007. (3) They shall be deemed to have come into force with effect fromthe 1st January, 2006. 2. In the Central Administration Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chairmen and Members) Rules, 1985, in rule 8, after sub-rule ( 3 , the following sub-rule sl~allbe inserted, namely :- "(2A) Age related additional quantum of pension.-Every Chairman. \'ice-Chairmen and Members shall be entitled to an additional quantum of pension in accordance with the following scale :- (4) G.S.R. 324(E). datedthe 3rd Mach, I988 (5) G.S.R. 12O(E), dated the 22nd February, 1989 (6) G.S.R 41 7(E), dated the 3 1st March, 1989 (7) G.S.R. 72(E), dated the 30rh January, 1992 (8) G.S.R. 41(E), datedthe lstFeb~.uary,1993 (9) G.S.R. 39(E), dated the 20th January, 1995 (10) G.S.R. 6I(E), datedthe29th January, 1998 (I I) G.S.R. 244(E). datedthc 14th March, 2000 (12) G.S.R. 536(E). datedthe 3rd Aupust.2007 (13) G.S.R. 545(E), datedthe22nd Jul),2009 (14) G.S.R 874(E), dated the 9th December,2009. -- Printed by the Manqer.
